name: clubgg-union
description: Peer-to-peer settlement system for a ClubGG poker union

scripts.db:up: docker compose up -d db && node scripts/wait-for-db.mjs
scripts.db:reset: pnpm db:nuke && pnpm db:up && pnpm db:migrate && pnpm db:seed
scripts.db:psql: docker compose exec -T db psql -U union -d union
scripts._comment_test: --test-concurrency=1 is required: the test files share one database and each resets it, so running files in parallel makes them truncate each other mid-test.
